## ValidatingFactoryResultMap class

A [FactoryResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.factoryresultmap.md) with a [validator](./ts-utils.collections.resultmapvalidator.md) property that enables validated use of the underlying map with weakly-typed keys and values.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ValidatingFactoryResultMap<TKey extends string = string, TValue = unknown> extends FactoryResultMap<TKey, TValue> 
```
**Extends:** [FactoryResultMap](./ts-utils.factoryresultmap.md)<!-- -->&lt;TKey, TValue&gt;
